game.log.initial.motd: MOTD: The Fracture shows no mercy, and neither does an empty pack.
game.log.initial.wake: You wake amid the shattered Shards with Aether in your bones.
game.log.rumor.1: Rumor: rift ruins hide the finest relics, but their guardians do not wake alone.
game.log.rumor.2: Rumor: every forge can strip hidden worth from broken gear if your hands stay steady.
game.log.rumor.3: Rumor: shardside merchants only trust business done under guarded roofs.
game.log.rumor.4: Rumor: the farther you walk, the sharper the steel and the harsher the teeth.
game.log.rumor.5: Rumor: tree lines near the center regrow slowly, so greedy chopping leaves long hungry roads.
game.log.rumor.6: Rumor: shallow ponds feed the patient, but lakes hide deeper rewards and deeper trouble.
game.log.rumor.7: Rumor: coal veins tend to sit where the land already looks half-burned and bitter.
game.log.rumor.8: Rumor: the best armor comes from surviving one more trip than you thought you could.
game.log.rumor.9: Rumor: some ruins look empty until the first step wakes everything inside.
game.log.rumor.10: Rumor: a full pack is safer than a sharp blade right up until the fighting starts.
game.log.rumor.11: Rumor: iron pays for persistence, copper pays for speed, and both punish dull tools.
game.log.rumor.12: Rumor: hunger kills more heroes than wolves ever will.
game.message.bloodMoon.begin: Blood moon begins. A red hunger sweeps the wilds.
game.message.bloodMoon.end: Blood moon ends. The night loosens its grip.
game.message.bloodMoon.foes.one: Blood moon horrors gather nearby (1 foe).
game.message.bloodMoon.foes.other: Blood moon horrors gather nearby ({count} foes).
game.message.claim.status.alreadyYours: This hex already belongs to your territory.
game.message.claim.status.emptyOnly: Only empty hexes can be claimed.
game.message.claim.status.mustConnect: New territory must connect to your existing border.
game.message.claim.status.nearOtherTerri: You cannot claim next to another territory.
game.message.claim.status.needsBannerMat: Claiming needs 1 Cloth and 1 Sticks for a banner.
game.message.claim.status.passableOnly: Only passable ground can be claimed.
game.message.claim.success: You raise a banner and claim the hex at {q}, {r}.
game.message.combat.respawn: You awaken at your home hex at {q}, {r}.
game.message.earthshake.noGround: Earthshake fades. No empty ground can split nearby.
game.message.earthshake.open: Earthshake. A rift ruin opens nearby at {q}, {r}.
game.message.harvestMoon.begin: Harvest moon rises. A cyan glow stirs the wild herbs and veins.
game.message.harvestMoon.end: Harvest moon fades and the cyan glow drains away.
game.message.harvestMoon.hexes.one: Harvest moon abundance spreads nearby (1 gathering hex).
game.message.harvestMoon.hexes.other: Harvest moon abundance spreads nearby ({count} gathering hexes).
game.message.home.scroll: The {item} tears a safe path through the Fracture and returns you home.
game.message.home.blockedByTerritory: You cannot set home on another player's territory.
game.message.prospect.empty: Nothing in your pack can be prospected.
game.message.prospect.success: You prospect your spare gear into raw materials.
game.message.sell.success: You sell your spare gear for {gold} gold.
